---
title: "Week 4 — Joins, Import & Exam"
subtitle: "June 8 – 12, 2026"
---

::: callout-important
**Exam is Thursday, June 11.** In-class portion in the morning (closed book, no AI); take-home portion released after class and due 11:59 p.m. that evening.
:::

We cover the last major data-handling tools — joining multiple tables and importing data from various sources — and then sit the exam. Friday is a light day with Project Checkpoint 1 due that night.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Files |
|---|---|---|
| Mon Jun 8 | [Joining tables: `inner_join`, `left_join`, etc.](day1-joins.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Tue Jun 9 | [Importing data: CSV, Excel, web URLs](day2-import.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Wed Jun 10 | [**Exam review** · practice problems](day3-exam-review.qmd) | review packet |
| Thu Jun 11 | [**EXAM**](day4-exam.qmd) | exam |
| Fri Jun 12 | [Intro to web scraping (light day)](day5-scraping.qmd) | slides, in-class code |

## Readings due this week

- Before Mon: *Data Computing* Ch 11 (§11.1–11.3) — joining two data frames
- Before Tue: *Data Computing* Ch 16 (§16.1–16.2, 16.4–16.5) — data formats, CSV, cleaning, factors
- Before Fri: *Data Computing* Ch 16 (§16.3) — HTML tables and web scraping

## Assignments due this week

- **Reading Quiz 4** — due before Monday's class (Canvas)
- **HW 3** — due Tue Jun 9, 11:59 p.m.
- **Exam (in-class + take-home)** — Thursday Jun 11
- **Project Checkpoint 1** — due Friday Jun 12, 11:59 p.m.
